user_query: I'm hosting a gaming competition at my college and I need to come up with unique prizes for the winners. Can you suggest some League of Legends champions along with their abilities that I can use as inspiration? Also, check the latest activity and price history of the Dreams & Nightmares Case on the Steam Store.

TaskList.description: Gather information on unique League of Legends champions and their abilities.
Check the latest activity and price history of the Dreams & Nightmares Case on the Steam Store.
